FOOTER.EU_FUNDING_INFO: This project has received funding from the European Union’s Horizon research and innovation program under grant agreement No 101056858

ICT_TOOLS_DESCRIPTION.CATALOGUE_EXPLORER_TOOL_DESCRIPTION: The Adaptation and Mitigation ( A&M) Catalogue Tool is an integral component of the NEVERMORE ICT toolkit. This user-friendly tool aligns with the core principles of the ICT toolkit, aiming to empower users in understanding the intricate interplay between climate change and adaptation and mitigation policies through a user-friendly and interactive interface. The tool is designed to provide a catalogue of solutions related to climate change mitigation and adaptation. It encompasses a review of cross-sectoral measures that have already been put into action, potential solutions identified through literature research, and scenarios collaboratively developed with local councils and stakeholders.
ICT_TOOLS_DESCRIPTION.GAMIFICATION_TOOL_DESCRIPTION: The main objective of NEVERMORE gamification tool is to create awareness about climate change. It is developed as an educational simulation game where players explore different solutions to fight  and adapt to the impacts of climate change. The game teaches players about the impacts of climate change while inspiring hope and motivating users to act and find effective solutions that will help to define a greener, better adapted and safer future. The game players must complete two different missions to finish the game.
ICT_TOOLS_DESCRIPTION.CASE_STUDY_TOOL_DESCRIPTION: The NEVERMORE Case Study tool will be a software component that allows users to select a case study and display the main climate change impacts, vulnerabilities and risks.  The information provided will be useful in order to create different adaptation and mitigation policy action scenarios based on measures selected by the user from the A&M catalogue at local scale.
ICT_TOOLS_DESCRIPTION.EU_SCALE_TOOL: The goal of the tool is to become a “policy-making tool”  that could offer relevant policy recommendations. The tool will be using pre-simulated data results from an Integrated Assessment Model (IAM), in order to decrease the complexity through the means of lowering the degree of freedom of the client input variables. This filtering and reduction of inputs will be done using the stakeholders’ knowledge.

CASE_STUDY_TOOL_COMPONENT.WELCOME_CASE_STUDY_TOOL: Welcome to NEVERMORE Case Study Tool
CASE_STUDY_TOOL_COMPONENT.CASE_STUDY_TOOL_INFO: The tool will make possible the evaluation of climate change impacts, vulnerabilities and risks. After that, some policy recommendationwill be provided according to your predefined hazards, expertise and interests. As a result, mitigation and adaptation indicators will be provided in order to evaluate the effects of policy selection.
CASE_STUDY_TOOL_COMPONENT.CASE_STUDY_TOOL_SELECT_CASE_STUDY: Select a case study to carry out your assessment!
CASE_STUDY_TOOL_COMPONENT.NAVIGATION_ADVICE: #To go to the desired case study press on the study's name

MURCIA_REGION_COMPONENT.SECTION_DESCRIPTION: In this section , you can find a general description of this case study and relevant information about the priority sectors and challenges to be covered during the adaptation and mitigation assessment.
MURCIA_REGION_COMPONENT.SECTOR_INFO: Click on a sector to know more information!

ECVS_COMPONENT.MAIN_HAZARDS: Main Hazards. Click on each one to know more information

ASSETS_AND_RISKS_COMPONENT.DESCRIPTION_BOX: In this box information related with the vulnerability assessment will be provided. It will include the different components used to characterize the vulnerability, including the number of affected assets, the main hazards and the indicators used in the assessment procedure

SECTORAL_COMPARISON_COMPONENT.VULNERABILITIES_AND_RISKS: Vulnerabilities and risks - Sectoral comparison Hazard

GAMIFICATION_TOOL_COMPONENT.GAMIFICATION_TOOL_INFO: The game teaches players about the impacts of climate change while inspiring hope and motivating users to act and find effective solutions that will help to define a greener, better adapted and safe future. The game players must complete two different missions to finish the game. In mission 1 players will explore pathways to reduce greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions applying solutions. Decisions in mission 1 will lead players to a high, medium or low carbon scenario in mission 2. In mission 2 players will be able to select one of the five NEVERMORE case studies (mountain, Mediterranean, boreal, island and flooding) and must act to prepare the communities for the impacts of climate change.
GAMIFICATION_TOOL_COMPONENT.CHOOSING_OPTION_INFO: The game will be able for execution as a single player or in groups. Choose your option!
GAMIFICATION_TOOL_COMPONENT.SINGLE_PLAYER_OPTION_INFO: Play the game as an individual user
GAMIFICATION_TOOL_COMPONENT.GROUP_OPTION_INFO: Use the game for group dynamics
